requirement_topic.en: Connector Interoperability — GB/T 20234 vs IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zh: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234与IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2
requirement_topic.zht: 接口互操作——GB/T 20234與IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2

summary.en: Georgia's EV charging infrastructure follows the IEC 62196 connector ecosystem consistent with its EU DCFTA alignment and GEOSTM adoption of IEC/EN standards. AC charging uses the IEC 62196-2 Type 2 (Mennekes) coupler; DC fast charging uses the Combined Charging System Combo 2 (CCS2), defined in IEC 62196-3 configuration FF. Major Georgian charge-point operators including E-Space and Tesla destination chargers deploy Type 2 / CCS2 connectors. IEC 62196 connector conformity is a technical interoperability requirement and becomes a mandatory project requirement when written into operator, site-owner, or procurement specifications. Georgia's growing EV adoption — notably high volumes of used-EV imports, with Tbilisi seeing particularly active charging demand — is driving expansion of IEC 62196-based public charging infrastructure.
summary.zh: 格鲁吉亚电动汽车充电基础设施采用IEC 62196接口体系，与其《欧盟深度及全面自由贸易区协定》对接方向及GEOSTM对IEC/EN标准的采用相一致。交流充电使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器；直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定义的联合充电系统Combo 2（CCS2）。格鲁吉亚主要充电点运营商包括E-Space和特斯拉目的地充电均部署Type 2 / CCS2接口。IEC 62196接口符合性属于技术互操作要求；当其写入运营商、场地方或采购规范时，即成为项目强制要求。格鲁吉亚电动汽车普及率持续提升——二手电动车进口量尤为可观，第比利斯充电需求尤其旺盛——正推动基于IEC 62196的公共充电基础设施扩张。
summary.zht: 喬治亞電動汽車充電基礎設施採用IEC 62196接口體系，與其《歐盟深度及全面自由貿易區協定》對接方向及GEOSTM對IEC/EN標準的採用相一致。交流充電使用IEC 62196-2 Type 2（Mennekes）耦合器；直流快充使用IEC 62196-3 FF配置定義的聯合充電系統Combo 2（CCS2）。喬治亞主要充電點運營商包括E-Space和特斯拉目的地充電均部署Type 2 / CCS2接口。IEC 62196接口符合性屬於技術互操作要求；當其寫入運營商、場地方或採購規範時，即成為項目強制要求。喬治亞電動汽車普及率持續提升——二手電動車進口量尤為可觀，第比利斯充電需求尤其旺盛——正推動基於IEC 62196的公共充電基礎設施擴張。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62196-2 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for a.c. pin and contact-tube accessories
IEC 62196-3 — Dimensional compatibility and interchangeability requirements for DC and AC/DC pin and contact-tube vehicle couplers
IEC 61851-1:2017 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 61851-23:2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 23: DC electric vehicle supply equipment
GEOSTM — Georgian National Agency for Standards and Metrology (geostm.gov.ge)

summary.en: China AC chargers use GB/T 20234.2 couplers and DC fast chargers use GB/T 20234.3 couplers. Although the GB/T 20234.2 AC coupler has a similar overall shape to the IEC 62196 Type 2, they differ in connector gender (GB/T uses male connector at the charger and female vehicle inlet, opposite to Type 2), signaling protocol (CC/CP versus PP/CP), and contact arrangement, making them physically and electrically incompatible. GB/T 20234.3 DC couplers are geometrically different from CCS2 and use a nine-pin configuration with CAN bus via GB/T 27930 communication, incompatible with the CCS2 / IEC 61851-24 communication stack used in Georgia's IEC-aligned charging network.
summary.zh: 中国交流充电桩采用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充采用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。尽管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形与IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但两者在接口性别（GB/T充电桩端为公口、车辆端为母口，与Type 2相反）、信号协议（CC/CP与PP/CP）及触点排列上均不同，在物理和电气层面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器与CCS2在几何形状上不同，采用九针配置并通过GB/T 27930 CAN总线通信，与格鲁吉亚IEC体系充电网络所用的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通信栈不兼容。
summary.zht: 中國交流充電樁採用GB/T 20234.2耦合器，直流快充採用GB/T 20234.3耦合器。儘管GB/T 20234.2交流耦合器外形與IEC 62196 Type 2相近，但兩者在接口性別（GB/T充電樁端為公口、車輛端為母口，與Type 2相反）、信號協議（CC/CP與PP/CP）及觸點排列上均不同，在物理和電氣層面互不兼容。GB/T 20234.3直流耦合器與CCS2在幾何形狀上不同，採用九針配置並通過GB/T 27930 CAN總線通訊，與喬治亞IEC體系充電網絡所用的CCS2 / IEC 61851-24通訊棧不兼容。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 20234.2-2015 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 2: AC charging coupler
GB/T 20234.3-2023 — Connection set for conductive charging of electric vehicles — Part 3: DC charging coupler
GB/T 27930-2023 — Communication protocols between off-board conductive charger and battery management system for electric vehicles
GB/T 18487.1-2023 — Electric vehicle conductive charging system — Part 1: General requirements

gap.en: A China GB/T-only charger is not connector-ready for Type 2 / CCS2 Georgia deployments. Conversion requires hardware redesign of the coupler, cable assembly, locking mechanism, proximity pilot and control pilot signaling, DC communication stack (from GB/T 27930 CAN to IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 where required), labels, test reports, temperature-rise evidence, and spare-part strategy. Adapters are not an accepted substitute for project-compliant connector design. Exporters must confirm the connector type required by the specific Georgian site owner, CPO, or procurement specification before quoting. Note: Georgia is NOT a member of the EAEU — the EAC/TR CU connector route does not apply.
gap.zh: 仅支持中国GB/T接口的充电桩不适用于格鲁吉亚Type 2 / CCS2部署。转换需要对耦合器、电缆组件、锁止机构、接近导引和控制导引信号、直流通信栈（在要求时从GB/T 27930 CAN转换为IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、标签、测试报告、温升证据及备件策略进行硬件重新设计。转接器不是项目合规接口设计的替代方案。出口商在报价前须确认具体格鲁吉亚场地方、充电点运营商或采购规范要求的接口类型。注意：格鲁吉亚不是欧亚经济联盟成员——EAC/TR CU接口路径不适用。
gap.zht: 僅支持中國GB/T接口的充電樁不適用於喬治亞Type 2 / CCS2部署。轉換需要對耦合器、電纜組件、鎖止機構、接近導引和控制導引信號、直流通訊棧（在要求時從GB/T 27930 CAN轉換為IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118）、標籤、測試報告、溫升證據及備件策略進行硬體重新設計。轉接器不是項目合規接口設計的替代方案。出口商在報價前須確認具體喬治亞場地方、充電點運營商或採購規範要求的接口類型。注意：喬治亞不是歐亞經濟聯盟成員——EAC/TR CU接口路徑不適用。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 is required by Georgian operator, site owner, or procurement specification; physical incompatibility with GB/T connectors makes substitution impossible without hardware redesign
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 20234 conformity applies to China domestic connector design and is not an IEC 62196 Type 2 / CCS2 substitute; EAC/TR CU route does not apply in Georgia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Connector conversion is a hardware and protocol redesign, not a paperwork exercise. Confirm whether the Georgia deployment requires IEC 62196 Type 2 for AC and CCS2 for DC before quoting, labelling, or shipping. GB/T connectors cannot be plugged into IEC 62196 vehicle inlets and vice versa. Do not claim EAC/TR CU route — Georgia is not in the EAEU.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 接口转换是硬件和协议重新设计，而非文件替换。在报价、贴标或发货前，应确认格鲁吉亚部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口无法插入IEC 62196车辆接口，反之亦然。不得声称EAC/TR CU路径——格鲁吉亚不在欧亚经济联盟内。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 接口轉換是硬體和協議重新設計，而非文件替換。在報價、貼標或發貨前，應確認喬治亞部署是否要求交流IEC 62196 Type 2和直流CCS2。GB/T接口無法插入IEC 62196車輛接口，反之亦然。不得聲稱EAC/TR CU路徑——喬治亞不在歐亞經濟聯盟內。
